zh.lifeSummary: 當John Welles 4th Lord Welles於1334年8月23日出生在英國林可爾史爾波東普時，他的父親Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles30歲，母親Margaret Bardolf22歲。他於大約1349年與Maude de Ros在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里奧爾蒙達斯 易曼德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1360年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1361年10月11日在英國林可爾史爾享年27歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Welles 4th Lord Welles于1334年8月23日出生在英国林可爾史爾波東普时，他的父亲Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles30岁，母亲Margaret Bardolf22岁。他于大约1349年与Maude de Ros在爱尔兰庫迪 克里奧爾蒙達斯 易曼德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1360年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1361年10月11日在英国林可爾史爾享年27岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Welles 4th Lord Welles was born on 23 August 1334, in Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Bardolf, was 22. He married Maude de Ros about 1349, in Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. In 1360, at the age of 26, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 11 October 1361, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Welles 4th Lord Welles est né le 23 août 1334, à Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bardolf, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Maude de Ros environ 1349, à Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. En 1360, à l’âge de 26 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1361, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Welles 4th Lord Welles am 23. August 1334 in Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Bardolf 22. Er hat um 1349 in Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irland Maude de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1360, als er 26 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1361 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Welles 4th Lord Welles è nato il il 23 agosto 1334 nel Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bardolf, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Maude de Ros circa 1349, nel Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1360, all'età di 26 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 11 ottobre 1361, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Welles 4th Lord Wellesが1334年8月23日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボンソルペで生まれた時，父Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Wellesは30歳，母Margaret Bardolfは22歳であった。約1349年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーオルモンド'ス イスランドでMaude de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1360年，26歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1361年10月11日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで27歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Welles 4th Lord Welles(이)가 1334년 8월 23일 영국 링코실르 본소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bardolf(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1349년 아일랜드 카운티 케리 오몽'스 이슬랜드에서 Maude de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1360년, 26세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1361년 10월 11일 영국 링코실르에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

mn.23 August 1334–11 October 1361: 1334 оны Наймдугаар сарын 23–1361 оны Аравдугаар сарын 11

pt.23 August 1334–11 October 1361: 23 de agosto de 1334–11 de outubro de 1361
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Welles 4th Lord Welles nasceu em 23 de agosto de 1334, em Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bardolf, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Maude de Ros aproximadamente 1349, em Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1360, com 26 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1361, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Welles 4th Lord Welles родился 23 августа 1334 г. в местности бонтаурп, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bardolf, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude de Ros около 1349 г. в местности ормонд'с исланд, коунти кирри, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1360 году, в возрасте 26 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 11 октября 1361 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия.

es.23 August 1334–11 October 1361: 23 de agosto de 1334–11 de octubre de 1361
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Welles 4th Lord Welles nació el 23 de agosto de 1334, en Bonthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Welles 3rd Lord Welles, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Bardolf, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Maude de Ros aproximadamente 1349, en Ormond's Island, County Kerry, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1360, a la edad de 26 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1361, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultado en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
